item.title: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of…
item.author: Gwyllm Llwydd (@gwyllm.bsky.social)
item.description: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow
item.content:encoded: “You cannot make billions of dollars without hurting lots of people. And you can’t hurt lots of people without, in some sense, believing that they’re not really people.” Corey Doctorow

item.title: 台風消滅したらしいですね🌀 とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫 土曜の夜、夜更かしして…
item.author: 白川えま✨Aroma Levante (@emalevante.bsky.social)
item.description:
台風消滅したらしいですね🌀
とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

土曜の夜、夜更かししてるお兄様🥰
よかったらオイルマッサージで癒されに来ませんか✨
この後2:00までDMお返事できませんので、ご予約の方はお店まで📞

お待ちしております(*´˘`*)♡

#メンエス #メンズエステ #代々木

item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…
item.author: 翻訳の吉田俊太郎 (@shuntaroyoshida.bsky.social)
item.description:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！
item.content:encoded:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: ＜エアコンの悪臭対策＞ エアコンの冷風に"嫌なニオイ"を感じたことはありませんか？これは、室内の生活臭やカビが原因の場合…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
＜エアコンの悪臭対策＞
エアコンの冷風に"嫌なニオイ"を感じたことはありませんか？これは、室内の生活臭やカビが原因の場合があります。
窓を開けて最低温度で約1時間冷房運転すると軽減することも。改善しなくても、エアコンに消臭剤などを吹きかけるのはNGです。
weathernews.jp/news/202606/...
item.content:encoded:
＜エアコンの悪臭対策＞
エアコンの冷風に"嫌なニオイ"を感じたことはありませんか？これは、室内の生活臭やカビが原因の場合があります。
窓を開けて最低温度で約1時間冷房運転すると軽減することも。改善しなくても、エアコンに消臭剤などを吹きかけるのはNGです。
weathernews.jp/news/202606/...

item.content:encoded:

item.title: お客様に話してはいるんだけど、 私本当に不眠症なんすよ。 寝る前ぐしゃぐしゃになってポストして、朝最悪だ〜！ってなること…
item.author: やまだいおり🐮とうぱに新宿御苑 (@panicyamada.bsky.social)
item.description:
お客様に話してはいるんだけど、
私本当に不眠症なんすよ。
寝る前ぐしゃぐしゃになってポストして、朝最悪だ〜！ってなること沢山あります。

それで買ってみました。
メラトニングミ。１回2粒と言われていますが、私は1粒で寝れてます。

確かに舌下吸収すると30分もすると不思議と眠たいかもな、、？って寝れちゃう不思議な代物なんですね。
海外では子供用の展開があるメジャーなものです。

でもね気付いたの。
これ食べた日は悪夢がすんごい。
なんかリアルなの。

調べたらメラトニンで悪夢見てる人たくさん！！

スムーズな入眠をとるか、
悪夢を見ない深いねむりをとるか。
毎晩べっどでにらめっこしてます。
item.content:encoded:
お客様に話してはいるんだけど、
私本当に不眠症なんすよ。
寝る前ぐしゃぐしゃになってポストして、朝最悪だ〜！ってなること沢山あります。

それで買ってみました。
メラトニングミ。１回2粒と言われていますが、私は1粒で寝れてます。

確かに舌下吸収すると30分もすると不思議と眠たいかもな、、？って寝れちゃう不思議な代物なんですね。
海外では子供用の展開があるメジャーなものです。

でもね気付いたの。
これ食べた日は悪夢がすんごい。
なんかリアルなの。

調べたらメラトニンで悪夢見てる人たくさん！！

スムーズな入眠をとるか、
悪夢を見ない深いねむりをとるか。
毎晩べっどでにらめっこしてます。

item.title: Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨ Whatever today held, leave i…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨

Whatever today held, leave it here. Tomorrow doesn’t ask you to be perfect, only to keep going.

Rest well, you’ve done enough for today
item.content:encoded:
Night night sweet dreamies 🌙✨

Whatever today held, leave it here. Tomorrow doesn’t ask you to be perfect, only to keep going.

Rest well, you’ve done enough for today

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)
item.content:encoded: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)

item.title: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White H…
item.author: Barack Obama (@barackobama.bsky.social)
item.description: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.
item.content:encoded: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.

item.title: . When you spend hours looking for your little black kitten …

item.description:
.
When you spend hours looking for your little black kitten . . .

... and suddenly...

item.content:encoded:
.

item.title: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que…
item.author: Serge Katz (@sk-serge.bsky.social)
item.description: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.
item.content:encoded: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.

item.title: "They've done everything possible to eliminate us" — Iran ca…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)
item.description: "They've done everything possible to eliminate us" — Iran captain Mehdi Taremi unleashes on FIFA and U.S. organizers
item.content:encoded: "They've done everything possible to eliminate us" — Iran captain Mehdi Taremi unleashes on FIFA and U.S. organizers

item.title: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time …
item.author: Michele (@burienwino.bsky.social)
item.description: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.
item.content:encoded: My hydrangeas have never been this huge, for the first time in 20 years, they're so big the squirrels just walk on them and I can't see any of the pots/water features I have back there for the birds. It's been one hell of growing season in Seattle for some reason.

Texas mandates Bible readings and Christian-infused curriculum in public schools.

item.title: 23:35 | 27/06 Approximate flight routes of our UAVs: 🔴 Re…
item.author: DroneBomber (@dronebomber.bsky.social)
item.description:
23:35 | 27/06

Approximate flight routes of our UAVs:

🔴 Red arrows — directions of strike UAV movement;
🔵 Blue arrows — directions of jet-powered UAV movement;
🟢 Green arrows — directions of cruise missile movement;

According to Russian sources, around 370 drones and several missiles
item.content:encoded:
23:35 | 27/06

Approximate flight routes of our UAVs:

🔴 Red arrows — directions of strike UAV movement;
🔵 Blue arrows — directions of jet-powered UAV movement;
🟢 Green arrows — directions of cruise missile movement;

According to Russian sources, around 370 drones and several missiles

item.title: She was hit by a truck and that could have been the end for …
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
She was hit by a truck and that could have been the end for this senior girl.

Just look how Airbus is now ❤️
item.content:encoded:
She was hit by a truck and that could have been the end for this senior girl.

Just look how Airbus is now ❤️

item.title: We have sad news. We’ve had to say goodbye to Delly. He was …
item.author: Emmettdoog (@emmettdoog.bsky.social)
item.description: We have sad news. We’ve had to say goodbye to Delly. He was rapidly losing all function in his hind quarters. The vet suspected a spinal tumor and the treatment options weren’t great. He was the goodest boy. We adopted him as a senior dog and every day with him was a gift.
item.content:encoded: We have sad news. We’ve had to say goodbye to Delly. He was rapidly losing all function in his hind quarters. The vet suspected a spinal tumor and the treatment options weren’t great. He was the goodest boy. We adopted him as a senior dog and every day with him was a gift.

#mypond ♥️ nyt
item.content:encoded:

#mypond ♥️ nyt

item.title: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.
item.content:encoded: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.

item.title: Dr. Joseph Mercola, a vaccine skeptic with millions of follo…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Dr. Joseph Mercola, a vaccine skeptic with millions of followers, told parents for years that vitamin K shots were unnecessary for newborns. Now he's changed his mind.

The reversal came after we contacted him while reporting on babies who died after parents declined the shot: propub.li/4aowazm
item.content:encoded:
Dr. Joseph Mercola, a vaccine skeptic with millions of followers, told parents for years that vitamin K shots were unnecessary for newborns. Now he's changed his mind.

The reversal came after we contacted him while reporting on babies who died after parents declined the shot: propub.li/4aowazm

item.title: quase um mês depois e finalmente chegou
item.author: maricona tortinha de bell (@raphaeltf.bsky.social)
item.description: quase um mês depois e finalmente chegou
item.content:encoded: quase um mês depois e finalmente chegou

item.title: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to r…
item.author: Lorraine Carey (@lalawriter71.bsky.social)
item.description: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to relax in the country for a week. I just may be tempted to bring my notebook.
item.content:encoded: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to relax in the country for a week. I just may be tempted to bring my notebook.
